title: Clothes Are Conspirators.
content:
Though from without no foes at all we fear,
    We shall be wounded by the clothes we wear.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Clothes Are Conspirators.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
